block_00: We wish you a joyful holiday season and a prosperous 2019!
block_01: With the holidays in full swing, we would like to thank you for being a part of our trading community and choosing IQ Option as your trusted broker.
block_02: 2018 came with its unique set of challenges — each challenge inspired us to work harder and evolve, further motivating us to deliver a better trading platform for all. We set higher goals and achieved more this year. And it is all thanks to you! You are what keeps us going.
block_03: Going into the coming year, we are committed more than ever to provide our traders with the tools they need to grow and expand their knowledge. Rest assured the entire IQ Option team will be working diligently year-round to make sure your trading experience is the best that it can be.
block_04: Thank you for this incredible year!
block_08: We would like to invite you to three exclusive webinars packed with information that is sure to come in handy next year!
